name: Fashion Valkyries Saga of Style
description: Immerse yourself in the magical world of the North to meet the northern valkyrie warriors and create relevant fashionable images for brave girls. Choose beautiful fur outfits, shining armor, and unusual accessories inspired by northern myths. Experiment with ethnic hairstyles and militant makeup. Try to assemble for each girl the perfect heroic image worthy of the harsh northern warriors!
instructions: Depending on the gaming device either a click of a computer mouse or a simple touch on touchscreens is used to control it
